meta_title: Kaption MCP — Connect AI to Your WhatsApp
meta_description: Use Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or any AI assistant to read and manage your WhatsApp conversations — without giving up your privacy.
hero_subtitle: Use Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or any AI assistant to read and manage your WhatsApp conversations — without giving up your privacy.
privacy_title: We Never Read or Store Your Messages
privacy_body: Your messages are processed locally by the extension in your browser. The cloud relay forwards commands but never reads or stores message content. The code is 100% open source — verify it yourself.
cloud_desc: Works with any AI tool. Easy setup — just add the connection URL. Compatible with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and all MCP clients.
cloud_privacy: We never read or store your messages. All data is processed locally by the extension in your browser.
local_desc: Runs on your computer. Requires your PC to be on and WhatsApp Web open. Less compatible with some AI tools.
local_privacy: We don't store anything in the cloud — so your computer needs to be running.
step2_desc: Open your AI tool and add the WhatsApp MCP connection
step3_desc: Ask your AI to read, search, or manage your conversations
verified_body: Every deploy is cryptographically signed and recorded in a public transparency log. You can verify that the code running here matches what's on GitHub.
